TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_frog_Uva
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: eh sua taa pomomuara mahin ia 'una manu tinpuru ia mataa tamtituin 'enia pungana 'enia takarura.
S.PHON: eh sua taa pomomuar~…ĺa mahin ia Ēuna manu tinpur~…ĺu ia mataa tamtituin Ēenia puŇčana Ēenia takar~…ĺur~…ĺa.
S.FORM: eh sua taa pomomuara mahin ia 'una manu tinpuru ia mataa tamtituin 'enia pungana 'enia takarura.
S.PHON: eh sua taa pomomuar~…ĺa mahin ia Ēuna manu tinpur~…ĺu ia mataa tamtituin Ēenia puŇčana Ēenia takar~…ĺur~…ĺa.
S.TRANSL: Now we are going to talk about a child sitting with his dog. There is an urn and a frog.

S.FORM: 'ena pungana takarura.
S.PHON: Ēena puŇčana takar~…ĺur~…ĺa.
S.FORM: 'ena pungana takarura.
S.PHON: Ēena puŇčana takar~…ĺur~…ĺa.
S.TRANSL: The frog is in the urn.

S.FORM: uh tanaheen isi 'una vuan sua ihi ia Čncoo sinangin sinangin misee.
S.PHON: uh tanaheen isi Ēuna vuan sua ihi ia …®n ¶oo sinaŇčin sinaŇčin misee.
S.FORM: uh tanaheen isi 'una vuan sua ihi ia Čncoo sinangin sinangin misee.
S.PHON: uh tanaheen isi Ēuna vuan sua ihi ia …®n ¶oo sinaŇčin sinaŇčin misee.
S.TRANSL: This is his home. There exists the moon which is his lighting. I think it must be the lighting.

S.FORM: eh muhacu cu muhacu nesi ia se'ec Čp Č manu iha tatar Č.
S.PHON: eh muha ¶u ¶u muha ¶u nesi ia se Ēe ¶…®p…® manu iha tatar~…ĺ…®.
S.FORM: eh muhacu cu muhacu nesi ia se'ec Čp Č manu iha tatar Č.
S.PHON: eh muha ¶u ¶u muha ¶u nesi ia se Ēe ¶…®p…® manu iha tatar~…ĺ…®.
S.TRANSL: Here the child slept in the bed.

S.FORM: se'ec Čp Č 'e tikirimi Čh aramia' Č cumu' Čra Čh takarura nimon nimusikar Č na pungana.
S.PHON: se Ēe ¶…®p…® Ēe tikir~…ĺimi …®h ar~…ĺamia Ē…® ¶umu Ē…®r~…ĺa …®h takar~…ĺur~…ĺa nimon nimusikar~…ĺ…® na puŇčana.
S.FORM: se'ec Čp Č 'e tikirimi Čh aramia' Č cumu' Čra Čh takarura nimon nimusikar Č na pungana.
S.PHON: se Ēe ¶…®p…® Ēe tikir~…ĺimi …®h ar~…ĺamia Ē…® ¶umu Ē…®r~…ĺa …®h takar~…ĺur~…ĺa nimon nimusikar~…ĺ…® na puŇčana.

TRANSL.notes: After sleeping, (the boy) was seeking the frog which had dropped into the urn.

S.TRANSL: After sleeping, was seeking the frog which had dropped into the urn.

S.FORM: nimusika nimusikar Č na pungana tia arapapining.
S.PHON: nimusika nimusikar~…ĺ…® na puŇčana tia ar~…ĺapapiniŇč.
S.FORM: nimusika nimusikar Č na pungana tia arapapining.
S.PHON: nimusika nimusikar~…ĺ…® na puŇčana tia ar~…ĺapapiniŇč.

TRANSL.notes: (The frog) which had been dropped into the urn went out.

S.TRANSL: which had been dropped into the urn went out.

S.FORM: aramia' Č manu isa tikirim.
S.PHON: ar~…ĺamia Ē…® manu isa tikir~…ĺim.
S.FORM: aramia' Č manu isa tikirim.
S.PHON: ar~…ĺamia Ē…® manu isa tikir~…ĺim.
S.TRANSL: That child woke up and looked around.

S.FORM: makahuacu uh aramia' Č manu iat sua tamtituin ia 'esi na kukuceen.
S.PHON: makahua ¶u uh ar~…ĺamia Ē…® manu iat sua tamtituin ia Ēesi na kuku ¶een.
S.FORM: makahuacu uh aramia' Č manu iat sua tamtituin ia 'esi na kukuceen.
S.PHON: makahua ¶u uh ar~…ĺamia Ē…® manu iat sua tamtituin ia Ēesi na kuku ¶een.
S.TRANSL: Then the child woke up, and his dog was behind him.

S.FORM: a Čncee pungana ni'ona tamtitu nipu'ara'ang arapapining ta'anin kangvang.
S.PHON: a…®n ¶ee puŇčana ni Ēona tamtitu nipu Ēar~…ĺa ĒaŇč ar~…ĺapapiniŇč ta Ēanin kaŇčvaŇč.
S.FORM: a Čncee pungana ni'ona tamtitu nipu'ara'ang arapapining ta'anin kangvang.
S.PHON: a…®n ¶ee puŇčana ni Ēona tamtitu nipu Ēar~…ĺa ĒaŇč ar~…ĺapapiniŇč ta Ēanin kaŇčvaŇč.
S.TRANSL: Here is the urn! The dog that had been outstayed.

S.FORM: Čncaa nguain tamna kucu manu tamna kucu.
S.PHON: …®n ¶aa Ňčuain tamna ku ¶u manu tamna ku ¶u.
S.FORM: Čncaa nguain tamna kucu manu tamna kucu.
S.PHON: …®n ¶aa Ňčuain tamna ku ¶u manu tamna ku ¶u.
S.TRANSL: There are his shoes, the kid's shoes.

S.FORM: eh makasuacu sua tamtitu iha nimusikar Č na pungana 'an tavar Č' Č arapapining.
S.PHON: eh makasua ¶u sua tamtitu iha nimusikar~…ĺ…® na puŇčana Ēan tavar~…ĺ…® Ē…® ar~…ĺapapiniŇč.
S.FORM: eh makasuacu sua tamtitu iha nimusikar Č na pungana 'an tavar Č' Č arapapining.
S.PHON: eh makasua ¶u sua tamtitu iha nimusikar~…ĺ…® na puŇčana Ēan tavar~…ĺ…® Ē…® ar~…ĺapapiniŇč.
S.TRANSL: After that, the dog inside the urn couldn't get out of it.

S.FORM: eh manu isi c Čr Č Čn kee carapungin.
S.PHON: eh manu isi ¶…®r~…ĺ…®…®n kee ¶ar~…ĺapuŇčin.
S.FORM: eh manu isi c Čr Č Čn kee carapungin.
S.PHON: eh manu isi ¶…®r~…ĺ…®…®n kee ¶ar~…ĺapuŇčin.
S.TRANSL: This kid, he looked at his hat.

S.FORM: 'an tara' Č makacarapung si nimusikar Č na pungana.
S.PHON: Ēan tar~…ĺa Ē…® maka ¶ar~…ĺapuŇč si nimusikar~…ĺ…® na puŇčana.
S.FORM: 'an tara' Č makacarapung si nimusikar Č na pungana.
S.PHON: Ēan tar~…ĺa Ē…® maka ¶ar~…ĺapuŇč si nimusikar~…ĺ…® na puŇčana.
S.TRANSL: He couldn't wear the hat because it had dropped into the urn.

S.FORM: 'enia kan ta'anin.
S.PHON: Ēenia kan ta Ēanin.
S.FORM: 'enia kan ta'anin.
S.PHON: Ēenia kan ta Ēanin.
S.TRANSL: It said that his chair was there.

S.FORM: makahuacu mosa manu iha na si'in Čva.
S.PHON: makahua ¶u mosa manu iha na si Ēin…®va.
S.FORM: makahuacu mosa manu iha na si'in Čva.
S.PHON: makahua ¶u mosa manu iha na si Ēin…®va.
S.TRANSL: After that, that kid went to the door.

S.FORM: pokari 'akia kan nguain tamna takarura.
S.PHON: pokar~…ĺi Ēakia kan Ňčuain tamna takar~…ĺur~…ĺa.
S.FORM: pokari 'akia kan nguain tamna takarura.
S.PHON: pokar~…ĺi Ēakia kan Ňčuain tamna takar~…ĺur~…ĺa.

TRANSL.notes: (The kid) shouted that his frog had disappeared.

S.TRANSL: shouted that his frog had disappeared.

S.FORM: maracococua mataa tamtituin.
S.PHON: mar~…ĺa ¶o ¶o ¶ua mataa tamtituin.
S.FORM: maracococua mataa tamtituin.
S.PHON: mar~…ĺa ¶o ¶o ¶ua mataa tamtituin.
S.TRANSL: He kept walking with his doggy.

S.FORM: Čh tamtitu ia nimusikar Č 'inia pungana 'an tar Č' Č pokarikari.
S.PHON: …®h tamtitu ia nimusikar~…ĺ…® Ēinia puŇčana Ēan tar~…ĺ…® Ē…® pokar~…ĺikar~…ĺi.
S.FORM: Čh tamtitu ia nimusikar Č 'inia pungana 'an tar Č' Č pokarikari.
S.PHON: …®h tamtitu ia nimusikar~…ĺ…® Ēinia puŇčana Ēan tar~…ĺ…® Ē…® pokar~…ĺikar~…ĺi.
S.TRANSL: The dog dropped into the urn and could not call out.

S.FORM: Čh 'ecu metetar Č tikirimikee nguain Čh takarura 'akia.
S.PHON: …®h Ēe ¶u metetar~…ĺ…® tikir~…ĺimikee Ňčuain …®h takar~…ĺur~…ĺa Ēakia.
S.FORM: Čh 'ecu metetar Č tikirimikee nguain Čh takarura 'akia.
S.PHON: …®h Ēe ¶u metetar~…ĺ…® tikir~…ĺimikee Ňčuain …®h takar~…ĺur~…ĺa Ēakia.

TRANSL.notes: (The kid) kept waiting, and looked for his lost frog.

S.TRANSL: kept waiting, and looked for his lost frog.

S.FORM: mononangcu na si'in Čveen.
S.PHON: mononaŇč ¶u na si Ēin…®veen.
S.FORM: mononangcu na si'in Čveen.
S.PHON: mononaŇč ¶u na si Ēin…®veen.

TRANSL.notes: (The kid) stayed still at the door.

S.FORM: 'esi meranas Č tamtitu i nimusikar Č na pungana 'an tara arapapining.
S.PHON: Ēesi mer~…ĺanas…® tamtitu i nimusikar~…ĺ…® na puŇčana Ēan tar~…ĺa ar~…ĺapapiniŇč.
S.FORM: 'esi meranas Č tamtitu i nimusikar Č na pungana 'an tara arapapining.
S.PHON: Ēesi mer~…ĺanas…® tamtitu i nimusikar~…ĺ…® na puŇčana Ēan tar~…ĺa ar~…ĺapapiniŇč.
S.TRANSL: This distressed dog worried that it could not go out from the urn it had entered.

S.FORM: Čh mecocuacu nesi niarapapiningcu tamtitu aio macangcangar Č manu ia keriviin kee makasi.
S.PHON: …®h me ¶o ¶ua ¶u nesi niar~…ĺapapiniŇč ¶u tamtitu aio ma ¶aŇč ¶aŇčar~…ĺ…® manu ia ker~…ĺiviin kee makasi.
S.FORM: Čh mecocuacu nesi niarapapiningcu tamtitu aio macangcangar Č manu ia keriviin kee makasi.
S.PHON: …®h me ¶o ¶ua ¶u nesi niar~…ĺapapiniŇč ¶u tamtitu aio ma ¶aŇč ¶aŇčar~…ĺ…® manu ia ker~…ĺiviin kee makasi.
S.TRANSL: Those two has been together. The dog has been out of the urn. The kid was very happy and held the dog.

S.FORM: sii a nimusikar Č na 'a satu'u a' satu'u 'a nencu maracocua mataa tamtitu mataa manu ihi.
S.PHON: sii a nimusikar~…ĺ…® na Ēa satu Ēu a Ē satu Ēu Ēa nen ¶u mar~…ĺa ¶o ¶ua mataa tamtitu mataa manu ihi.
S.FORM: sii a nimusikar Č na 'a satu'u a' satu'u 'a nencu maracocua mataa tamtitu mataa manu ihi.
S.PHON: sii a nimusikar~…ĺ…® na Ēa satu Ēu a Ē satu Ēu Ēa nen ¶u mar~…ĺa ¶o ¶ua mataa tamtitu mataa manu ihi.

TRANSL.notes: Because (it) had dropped into the box... yeah, the box. How is it? The dog and the kid walked together.

S.TRANSL: Because had dropped into the box... yeah, the box. How is it? The dog and the kid walked together.

S.FORM: 'inakaru Čh na ramisi ' Čn Č' Čnai maracocua monia pokari takarura 'ekasu nan takarura arapapininga.
S.PHON: Ēinakar~…ĺu …®h na r~…ĺamisi Ē…®n…® Ē…®nai mar~…ĺa ¶o ¶ua monia pokar~…ĺi takar~…ĺur~…ĺa Ēekasu nan takar~…ĺur~…ĺa ar~…ĺapapiniŇča.
S.FORM: 'inakaru Čh na ramisi ' Čn Č' Čnai maracocua monia pokari takarura 'ekasu nan takarura arapapininga.
S.PHON: Ēinakar~…ĺu …®h na r~…ĺamisi Ē…®n…® Ē…®nai mar~…ĺa ¶o ¶ua monia pokar~…ĺi takar~…ĺur~…ĺa Ēekasu nan takar~…ĺur~…ĺa ar~…ĺapapiniŇča.
S.TRANSL: The stay in the tree, uh... at the tree, calling "Frog~~ where are you, frog, come on out."

S.FORM: 'a c Č' Črenia karu ihi 'una uh tarako.
S.PHON: Ēa ¶…® Ē…®r~…ĺenia kar~…ĺu ihi Ēuna uh tar~…ĺako.
S.FORM: 'a c Č' Črenia karu ihi 'una uh tarako.
S.PHON: Ēa ¶…® Ē…®r~…ĺenia kar~…ĺu ihi Ēuna uh tar~…ĺako.
S.TRANSL: He looked at this tree. There is a hole.

S.FORM: 'una tarako a' eio 'unaava nesi anu nimutatin na karu.
S.PHON: Ēuna tar~…ĺako a Ē eio Ēunaava nesi anu nimutatin na kar~…ĺu.
S.FORM: 'una tarako a' eio 'unaava nesi anu nimutatin na karu.
S.PHON: Ēuna tar~…ĺako a Ē eio Ēunaava nesi anu nimutatin na kar~…ĺu.
S.TRANSL: There is a hole. Oh! So there is a beehive suspended here in the tree!

S.FORM: moninia tasa ihi.
S.PHON: moninia tasa ihi.
S.FORM: moninia tasa ihi.
S.PHON: moninia tasa ihi.

S.FORM: mara na anu ia nimatapari'i tamtitu na canum.
S.PHON: mar~…ĺa na anu ia nimatapar~…ĺi Ēi tamtitu na ¶anum.
S.FORM: mara na anu ia nimatapari'i tamtitu na canum.
S.PHON: mar~…ĺa na anu ia nimatapar~…ĺi Ēi tamtitu na ¶anum.
S.TRANSL: Holding that beehive, the dog dropped into the pool.

S.FORM: nimatapari na tamtitu ia nimatapari na canum.
S.PHON: nimatapar~…ĺi na tamtitu ia nimatapar~…ĺi na ¶anum.
S.FORM: nimatapari na tamtitu ia nimatapari na canum.
S.PHON: nimatapar~…ĺi na tamtitu ia nimatapar~…ĺi na ¶anum.
S.TRANSL: That dog dropped into the pool

S.FORM: 'eepania Čh meranas Č tamtitu ia tia asa matisa' Č Čh anu ia.
S.PHON: Ēeepania …®h mer~…ĺanas…® tamtitu ia tia asa matisa Ē…® …®h anu ia.
S.FORM: 'eepania Čh meranas Č tamtitu ia tia asa matisa' Č Čh anu ia.
S.PHON: Ēeepania …®h mer~…ĺanas…® tamtitu ia tia asa matisa Ē…® …®h anu ia.
S.TRANSL: That dog was still struggling and wanted to grasp the beehive.

S.FORM: ma'ic Čp Č 'una anu misee.
S.PHON: ma Ēi ¶…®p…® Ēuna anu misee.
S.FORM: ma'ic Čp Č 'una anu misee.
S.PHON: ma Ēi ¶…®p…® Ēuna anu misee.
S.TRANSL: The kid slept on the floor. It appeared that he felt fear about bees.

S.FORM: makasuacu tia asa mopara 'inia nivatu ai monia manu ia pokari mataa tacau.
S.PHON: makasua ¶u tia asa mopar~…ĺa Ēinia nivatu ai monia manu ia pokar~…ĺi mataa ta ¶au.
S.FORM: makasuacu tia asa mopara 'inia nivatu ai monia manu ia pokari mataa tacau.
S.PHON: makasua ¶u tia asa mopar~…ĺa Ēinia nivatu ai monia manu ia pokar~…ĺi mataa ta ¶au.
S.TRANSL: Then the child wanted to come climbing up and stayed there, and then called with the dog.

S.FORM: 'ei niarapapining na canumu takarura isa.
S.PHON: Ēei niar~…ĺapapiniŇč na ¶anumu takar~…ĺur~…ĺa isa.
S.FORM: 'ei niarapapining na canumu takarura isa.
S.PHON: Ēei niar~…ĺapapiniŇč na ¶anumu takar~…ĺur~…ĺa isa.
S.TRANSL: That frog emerged from the water.

S.FORM: arakicac Č manu ia ' Čk Čr Čn kee ivicin makasi na.
S.PHON: ar~…ĺaki ¶a ¶…® manu ia Ē…®k…®r~…ĺ…®n kee ivi ¶in makasi na.
S.FORM: arakicac Č manu ia ' Čk Čr Čn kee ivicin makasi na.
S.PHON: ar~…ĺaki ¶a ¶…® manu ia Ē…®k…®r~…ĺ…®n kee ivi ¶in makasi na.
S.TRANSL: The kid was surprised, and he put his hands to his mouse.

S.FORM: capai kee arakicac Č tu aio 'unaava anu nesi.
S.PHON: ¶apai kee ar~…ĺaki ¶a ¶…® tu aio Ēunaava anu nesi.
S.FORM: capai kee arakicac Č tu aio 'unaava anu nesi.
S.PHON: ¶apai kee ar~…ĺaki ¶a ¶…® tu aio Ēunaava anu nesi.
S.TRANSL: He was surprised that so there are bees here!

S.FORM: 'an ma'ic Čp Č tamtituin mon 'inia monacunia pokari a 'unaava tungingi 'una tungingi isi 'a c Čnra na tacau i.
S.PHON: Ēan ma Ēi ¶…®p…® tamtituin mon Ēinia mona ¶unia pokar~…ĺi a Ēunaava tuŇčiŇči Ēuna tuŇčiŇči isi Ēa ¶…®nr~…ĺa na ta ¶au i.
S.FORM: 'an ma'ic Čp Č tamtituin mon 'inia monacunia pokari a 'unaava tungingi 'una tungingi isi 'a c Čnra na tacau i.
S.PHON: Ēan ma Ēi ¶…®p…® tamtituin mon Ēinia mona ¶unia pokar~…ĺi a Ēunaava tuŇčiŇči Ēuna tuŇčiŇči isi Ēa ¶…®nr~…ĺa na ta ¶au i.
S.TRANSL: His dog did not feel affraid and stayed there. Just stayed there. He shouted out that there was a mouse so! The dog saw it.

S.FORM: makaicu ne moca manu ia mosa na karu maringuna.
S.PHON: makai ¶u ne mo ¶a manu ia mosa na kar~…ĺu mar~…ĺiŇčuna.
S.FORM: makaicu ne moca manu ia mosa na karu maringuna.
S.PHON: makai ¶u ne mo ¶a manu ia mosa na kar~…ĺu mar~…ĺiŇčuna.
S.TRANSL: It appealed that the child came here and went over the withered tree.

S.FORM: c Čm Č' Čra na tarako isa 'esikara nia nguain tamna takarura.
S.PHON: ¶…®m…® Ē…®r~…ĺa na tar~…ĺako isa Ēesikar~…ĺa nia Ňčuain tamna takar~…ĺur~…ĺa.
S.FORM: c Čm Č' Čra na tarako isa 'esikara nia nguain tamna takarura.
S.PHON: ¶…®m…® Ē…®r~…ĺa na tar~…ĺako isa Ēesikar~…ĺa nia Ňčuain tamna takar~…ĺur~…ĺa.
S.TRANSL: He went to see that hole whether his frog was inside there or not.

S.FORM: 'akia.
S.PHON: Ēakia.
S.FORM: 'akia.
S.PHON: Ēakia.

S.FORM: 'akia takarura moncu nesi manu isi pokari takarura 'esikasu nanu mihee.
S.PHON: Ēakia takar~…ĺur~…ĺa mon ¶u nesi manu isi pokar~…ĺi takar~…ĺur~…ĺa Ēesikasu nanu mihee.
S.FORM: 'akia takarura moncu nesi manu isi pokari takarura 'esikasu nanu mihee.
S.PHON: Ēakia takar~…ĺur~…ĺa mon ¶u nesi manu isi pokar~…ĺi takar~…ĺur~…ĺa Ēesikasu nanu mihee.
S.TRANSL: The frog was not there. The kid kept saying 'where did my frog go?'

S.FORM: ei! arakicac Č manu isi ararakau puka.
S.PHON: ei! ar~…ĺaki ¶a ¶…® manu isi ar~…ĺar~…ĺakau puka.
S.FORM: ei! arakicac Č manu isi ararakau puka.
S.PHON: ei! ar~…ĺaki ¶a ¶…® manu isi ar~…ĺar~…ĺakau puka.
S.TRANSL: The kid was shocked by the coming out of the owl.

S.FORM: ararakau sua puka isi na tarako niaranai na tarako arapapining.
S.PHON: ar~…ĺar~…ĺakau sua puka isi na tar~…ĺako niar~…ĺanai na tar~…ĺako ar~…ĺapapiniŇč.
S.FORM: ararakau sua puka isi na tarako niaranai na tarako arapapining.
S.PHON: ar~…ĺar~…ĺakau sua puka isi na tar~…ĺako niar~…ĺanai na tar~…ĺako ar~…ĺapapiniŇč.
S.TRANSL: The owl came out from the hole. It came from the hole to the outside.

S.FORM: matapari'i sua manu isi na ' Čn Č' Čnai careencu.
S.PHON: matapar~…ĺi Ēi sua manu isi na Ē…®n…® Ē…®nai ¶ar~…ĺeen ¶u.
S.FORM: matapari'i sua manu isi na ' Čn Č' Čnai careencu.
S.PHON: matapar~…ĺi Ēi sua manu isi na Ē…®n…® Ē…®nai ¶ar~…ĺeen ¶u.
S.TRANSL: The child fell down to the earth. It is pitiful of him.

S.FORM: manguru nguain tamna tamtitu.
S.PHON: maŇčur~…ĺu Ňčuain tamna tamtitu.
S.FORM: manguru nguain tamna tamtitu.
S.PHON: maŇčur~…ĺu Ňčuain tamna tamtitu.

S.FORM: manguru nguain tamna tamtitu Čngcaa anu kecancancan pariku na tamtitu isi.
S.PHON: maŇčur~…ĺu Ňčuain tamna tamtitu …®Ňč ¶aa anu ke ¶an ¶an ¶an par~…ĺiku na tamtitu isi.
S.FORM: manguru nguain tamna tamtitu Čngcaa anu kecancancan pariku na tamtitu isi.
S.PHON: maŇčur~…ĺu Ňčuain tamna tamtitu …®Ňč ¶aa anu ke ¶an ¶an ¶an par~…ĺiku na tamtitu isi.
S.TRANSL: The doggy ran away because it was being chased by a swarm of bees.

S.FORM: pokari arapapining 'una puka.
S.PHON: pokar~…ĺi ar~…ĺapapiniŇč Ēuna puka.
S.FORM: pokari arapapining 'una puka.
S.PHON: pokar~…ĺi ar~…ĺapapiniŇč Ēuna puka.
S.TRANSL: He kept calling that dog, and that owl came out.

S.FORM: makahuacu manu isi mopara na karu ang Čco na vatu.

S.PHON: makahua ¶u manu isi mopar~…ĺa na kar~…ĺu aŇč…® ¶o na vatu.
S.TRANSL: Then the kid climbed a tree‚Ä¶ oh a stone.

S.FORM: ka'an Čva ka vutun.
S.PHON: ka Ēan…®va ka vutun.
S.FORM: ka'an Čva ka vutun.
S.PHON: ka Ēan…®va ka vutun.
S.TRANSL: But, it's not a tree. It's a deer.

S.FORM: 'an tavar Č' Č makahi nen ninpara na vatu 'esi vutun nehi.
S.PHON: Ēan tavar~…ĺ…® Ē…® makahi nen ninpar~…ĺa na vatu Ēesi vutun nehi.
S.FORM: 'an tavar Č' Č makahi nen ninpara na vatu 'esi vutun nehi.
S.PHON: Ēan tavar~…ĺ…® Ē…® makahi nen ninpar~…ĺa na vatu Ēesi vutun nehi.
S.TRANSL: He doesn't know that the deer was still there.

S.FORM: c Čp Čngin ia karu nimacacaa mon na 'inia.
S.PHON: ¶…®p…®Ňčin ia kar~…ĺu nima ¶a ¶aa mon na Ēinia.
S.FORM: c Čp Čngin ia karu nimacacaa mon na 'inia.
S.PHON: ¶…®p…®Ňčin ia kar~…ĺu nima ¶a ¶aa mon na Ēinia.
S.TRANSL: He thought that was a tree, and he stood above the stone.

S.TRANSL: Therefore, the dog was on the ground, scared very much.

S.FORM: 'e itar Čn kee sua nguain tamna.
S.PHON: Ēe itar~…ĺ…®n kee sua Ňčuain tamna.
S.FORM: 'e itar Čn kee sua nguain tamna.

S.TRANSL: When it came to this moment, the boy was still standing above the stone, he didn't know that was a deer.

S.FORM: makahuacu makasicu sian pokari na tacau isi.
S.PHON: makahua ¶u makasi ¶u sian pokar~…ĺi na ta ¶au isi.
S.FORM: makahuacu makasicu sian pokari na tacau isi.
S.PHON: makahua ¶u makasi ¶u sian pokar~…ĺi na ta ¶au isi.
S.TRANSL: Then, the kid kept calling his dog.

S.FORM: 'e pokariinkee manu isa ninpara na vutun.
S.PHON: Ēe pokar~…ĺiinkee manu isa ninpar~…ĺa na vutun.
S.FORM: 'e pokariinkee manu isa ninpara na vutun.
S.PHON: Ēe pokar~…ĺiinkee manu isa ninpar~…ĺa na vutun.
S.TRANSL: The dog was barking at that dog for his mounting the deer.

S.TRANSL: It fell on the ground, where was the edge of water. The deer came out.

S.FORM: makahuacu sua vutun ihi ia moha na tintinivisa manasU tia manguru mihee aiyo.

S.PHON: makahua ¶u sua vutun ihi ia moha na tintinivisa manasu tia maŇčur~…ĺu mihee aijo.
S.TRANSL: Then, the deer ran to the edge of the water. It seemed like that the deer wanted to ran away.

S.FORM: tavar Č' Čcu manu isa tu isieva ia vutun.

S.TRANSL: The kid understood this was a deer!

S.TRANSL: As he found that wasn't a bushy tree, he and his doggy was stunned and fell on the ground from the antlers and the slope.

S.FORM: makasuacu ma'ic Čp Č sua manu isi mata tamtitu pokariinkee.

S.TRANSL: Then, both of the kid and the doggy were really afraid. They were crying .

S.PHON: mai Ēi ¶…®p…® si nimusikar~…ĺ…® na ¶anum.
S.TRANSL: The dog was scared due to falling into the water.

S.FORM: makasuacu sua manu isi moon na nesi pokari 'takarura 'esikasu nanu'.

S.PHON: makasua ¶u sua manu isi moon na nesi pokar~…ĺi Ētakar~…ĺur~…ĺa Ēesikasu nanu Ē.
S.TRANSL: At the time, the boy kept calling the frog, saying 'frog, where are you?'

S.FORM: 'una karu maringuna isi 'una tarako tesikaren.
S.PHON: Ēuna kar~…ĺu mar~…ĺiŇčuna isi Ēuna tar~…ĺako tesikar~…ĺen.

S.PHON: Ēuna kar~…ĺu mar~…ĺiŇčuna isi Ēuna tar~…ĺako tesikar~…ĺen.
S.TRANSL: There was a dried tree, inside which there was a hole.

S.FORM: a sua tamtituin 'esi na canumu makananguru tekirim nguain tamna takarura.

S.PHON: a sua tamtituin Ēesi na ¶anumu makanaŇčur~…ĺu tekir~…ĺim Ňčuain tamna takar~…ĺur~…ĺa.
S.TRANSL: His dog was swimming in the water searching his frog.

S.FORM: mon nesi tamtituin mosikar Č na vatu karu tarako isi mata manu ihi tu.

S.PHON: mon nesi tamtituin mosikar~…ĺ…® na vatu kar~…ĺu tar~…ĺako isi mata manu ihi tu.
S.TRANSL: He and his dog entered the tree hole.

S.FORM: takarura takarura 'esikasu nan 'mehen 'akia'.
S.PHON: takar~…ĺur~…ĺa takar~…ĺur~…ĺa Ēesikasu nan Ēmehen Ēakia Ē.
S.FORM: takarura takarura 'esikasu nan 'mehen 'akia'.
S.PHON: takar~…ĺur~…ĺa takar~…ĺur~…ĺa Ēesikasu nan Ēmehen Ēakia Ē.
S.TRANSL: Both they said, 'Frog, frog where are you?'

S.FORM: makasicu tekirikiriminkee kipapapa na karu maringuna ihi.

S.PHON: makasi ¶u tekir~…ĺikir~…ĺiminkee kipapapa na kar~…ĺu mar~…ĺiŇčuna ihi.
S.TRANSL: They were keeping searching the frog around the tree.

S.FORM: ninpara tamtitu mata manu isi na karu pokari tu 'esikasu nanu takarura arapapiningacu.

S.FORM: ninpara tamtitu mata manu isi na karu pokari tu 'esikasu nanu takarura arapapiningacu.
S.PHON: ninpar~…ĺa tamtitu mata manu isi na kar~…ĺu pokar~…ĺi tu Ēesikasu nanu takar~…ĺur~…ĺa ar~…ĺapapiniŇča ¶u.
S.TRANSL: The doggy and the boy climbed the dried tree saying, 'where are you frog? Come out, please!'

S.FORM: 'anpa arapapining arapapining arakicac Č.
S.PHON: Ēanpa ar~…ĺapapiniŇč ar~…ĺapapiniŇč ar~…ĺaki ¶a ¶…®.
S.FORM: 'anpa arapapining arapapining arakicac Č.
S.PHON: Ēanpa ar~…ĺapapiniŇč ar~…ĺapapiniŇč ar~…ĺaki ¶a ¶…®.
S.TRANSL: The frog didn't come out for some time. They were shocked when the frog suddenly appeared.

S.FORM: manu isa mata tamtituava 'esi takarura mecocua.
S.PHON: manu isa mata tamtituava Ēesi takar~…ĺur~…ĺa me ¶o ¶ua.
S.FORM: manu isa mata tamtituava 'esi takarura mecocua.
S.PHON: manu isa mata tamtituava Ēesi takar~…ĺur~…ĺa me ¶o ¶ua.
S.TRANSL: The kid and the doggy found that the frog had been walking with another frog!

S.FORM: isiava nimta takarura ihi tekirim kar Čen.
S.PHON: isiava nimta takar~…ĺur~…ĺa ihi tekir~…ĺim kar~…ĺ…®en.
S.FORM: isiava nimta takarura ihi tekirim kar Čen.
S.PHON: isiava nimta takar~…ĺur~…ĺa ihi tekir~…ĺim kar~…ĺ…®en.
S.TRANSL: It was because that his lost frog had found his frog lover.

S.FORM: aiyo itumuru kar Čen c Čr Č Čn itumuru macangcangar Č manu isi ('es)i na vatu mata tamtitu.
S.PHON: aijo itumur~…ĺu kar~…ĺ…®en ¶…®r~…ĺ…®…®n itumur~…ĺu ma ¶aŇč ¶aŇčar~…ĺ…® manu isi ( Ēes)i na vatu mata tamtitu.
S.FORM: aiyo itumuru kar Čen c Čr Č Čn itumuru macangcangar Č manu isi ('es)i na vatu mata tamtitu.
S.PHON: aijo itumur~…ĺu kar~…ĺ…®en ¶…®r~…ĺ…®…®n itumur~…ĺu ma ¶aŇč ¶aŇčar~…ĺ…® manu isi ( Ēes)i na vatu mata tamtitu.
S.TRANSL: Oops, so many lovers were seen by the boy and his doggy who were happy standing on the rock.

S.FORM: c Č' Čr Č Čnkee takaruren cucurova takaruramita ia tenikirim kar Čen.
S.PHON: ¶…® Ē…®r~…ĺ…®…®nkee takar~…ĺur~…ĺen ¶u ¶ur~…ĺova takar~…ĺur~…ĺamita ia tenikir~…ĺim kar~…ĺ…®en.
S.FORM: c Č' Čr Č Čnkee takaruren cucurova takaruramita ia tenikirim kar Čen.
S.PHON: ¶…® Ē…®r~…ĺ…®…®nkee takar~…ĺur~…ĺen ¶u ¶ur~…ĺova takar~…ĺur~…ĺamita ia tenikir~…ĺim kar~…ĺ…®en.
S.TRANSL: He saw his frog. Our frog had found its lover!

S.FORM: tekirim kar Čen takarura kangvang.
S.PHON: tekir~…ĺim kar~…ĺ…®en takar~…ĺur~…ĺa kaŇčvaŇč.
S.FORM: tekirim kar Čen takarura kangvang.
S.PHON: tekir~…ĺim kar~…ĺ…®en takar~…ĺur~…ĺa kaŇčvaŇč.
S.TRANSL: The lover it found was also a frog.

S.FORM: kecancancan 'ancu Čt Č Čnkee nguain tamna tamtitu mata tacau si isiava nim Čt Ča kar Čen apakar Čr Č' Č nesi na kakar Čen.
S.PHON: ke ¶an ¶an ¶an Ēan ¶u …®t…®…®nkee Ňčuain tamna tamtitu mata ta ¶au si isiava nim…®t…®a kar~…ĺ…®en apakar~…ĺ…®r~…ĺ…® Ē…® nesi na kakar~…ĺ…®en.
S.FORM: kecancancan 'ancu Čt Č Čnkee nguain tamna tamtitu mata tacau si isiava nim Čt Ča kar Čen apakar Čr Č' Č nesi na kakar Čen.
S.PHON: ke ¶an ¶an ¶an Ēan ¶u …®t…®…®nkee Ňčuain tamna tamtitu mata ta ¶au si isiava nim…®t…®a kar~…ĺ…®en apakar~…ĺ…®r~…ĺ…® Ē…® nesi na kakar~…ĺ…®en.
S.TRANSL: The frog was getting along with other frogs well. It seemed not to see its master and the dog, because it had found many other good friends.

S.FORM: 'ancu tia moha na tanasa makahia manu mata tamtitu.
S.PHON: Ēan ¶u tia moha na tanasa makahia manu mata tamtitu.
S.FORM: 'ancu tia moha na tanasa makahia manu mata tamtitu.
S.PHON: Ēan ¶u tia moha na tanasa makahia manu mata tamtitu.
S.TRANSL: 'The frog would not like to go home,' the kid and the doggy thought.

S.FORM: takarura mocacukita tanasa sua kar Čansu makinanu mon sian.
S.PHON: takar~…ĺur~…ĺa mo ¶a ¶ukita tanasa sua kar~…ĺ…®ansu makinanu mon sian.
S.FORM: takarura mocacukita tanasa sua kar Čansu makinanu mon sian.
S.PHON: takar~…ĺur~…ĺa mo ¶a ¶ukita tanasa sua kar~…ĺ…®ansu makinanu mon sian.
S.TRANSL: Let's go, frog. It's ok that your lover stay here.

S.FORM: makahua ci sosomanpe sosomanpe kar Ča takarura.
S.PHON: makahua ¶i sosomanpe sosomanpe kar~…ĺ…®a takar~…ĺur~…ĺa.

S.PHON: makahua ¶i sosomanpe sosomanpe kar~…ĺ…®a takar~…ĺur~…ĺa.
S.TRANSL: Then, they just thanked his frog's lover.
